violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (back storage area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The (ceiling tiles ) in the (back storage area ) area is in poor repair.Observed holes, water damage, and/or missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The food prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the dish washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Chicken and potatoes were observed held between 105-117 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelves in the 3 bay sink area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinet shelves and deep freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, ice, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The floors under retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The ceiling in the food prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The ceiling tiles and wall in the back storage area is in poor repair (observed holes, previous water damage, and exposed insulation). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
